resources.string: SleepGuard does not read your messages, notifications, app content, location, microphone, or camera. This POC only reads screen on/off timing events from Android Usage Access in order to estimate nighttime phone interaction. Data is stored only on this device.
No data yet. Press \"Collect Last Night\".
Show raw events for this night
Cannot collect events because Usage Access is missing. Please enable Usage Access first.
No screen events found for the selected window. The device may not have retained usage events for that period.
Failed to collect usage events. Please check permission and try again.
Could not open Usage Access settings on this device. Please enable it manually under Settings > Apps > Special app access > Usage access.
